diagnosis: GCP alert triggered for high error rate (500 errors) in CuizAI Cloud Run service. Investigation found: (1) No ERROR logs in GCP Cloud Run for past 24 hours, (2) Service currently healthy with successful ping requests, (3) Recent code changes include sharing feature updates and .ppt format support - no obvious error-causing commits, (4) ACP runtime unavailable for automated code investigation. The error spike appears to have been transient and has resolved.
summary: Alert investigated - no recent errors found in GCP logs. Service is currently healthy. The 500 error spike was transient and has resolved. No code changes required. ACP runtime was unavailable for deeper code investigation.
